metadata.title: Toggle Meta Yaml
metadata.description: this is a simple plugin to toggle meta yaml.

regex.target: text: "切换元数据 YAML 设置"

regex.source: .setDesc("If disable, markdown meta yaml will be hidden. It only work at live preview mode, preview mode don't support currently. Source mode don't need it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用，Markdown 元数据 YAML 将被隐藏。它仅在实时预览模式下有效，当前预览模式不支持。源码模式不需要它。")
